history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, low-resolution image shows a man’s face and upper body with bold overlaid text reading “KURANG INFO AKU” and a laughing-sweat emoji.

The main subject is a person with a shaved or very short haircut, visible facial hair including a beard and mustache, and a partially open mouth. The person is shown from the shoulders up, angled slightly to the side, with the right hand near the face and the fingers touching or resting close to the mouth area.

The setting is unclear due to the tight crop, but there appears to be an outdoor or bright background with a pale sky and indistinct structures or surfaces behind him. Lighting looks bright and natural, and the image quality is blurry and pixelated.

Visual details include a warm skin tone, dark hair, and a dark beard, with the face taking most of the frame. The overlaid text is large, blocky, and in white with a black outline, arranged in three lines: “KURANG” on the first line, “INFO AKU” on the second line, and “KANG” on the third line, followed by a yellow emoji showing a laughing expression.

Visible Text:
KURANG
INFO AKU
KANG 😂

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a man with text overlaid across his chest. The text reads “KURANG INFO AKU KANG” and includes a laughing emoji.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

KURANG  
INFO AKU  
KANG 🤭

# Structured Version

- KURANG  
- INFO AKU  
- KANG 🤭

# Notes

- The last line “KANG” is unclear in meaning/context (it appears as “KANG” in the image), but the visible text is transcribed as written.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
